utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items explicitly. Each item is fully specified with appropriate details: the property section includes type, location, price, features, and move-in date; financing includes method, terms, amounts, interest rate, and fees; legal_services includes service name, level, cost, and completion date; moving_services includes service name, level, cost, and included items; setup_services includes type, cost, and listed utilities; total_budget includes cost breakdown with currency and all relevant subtotals. Therefore, all 6/6 items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final solution involves purchasing a 4-bedroom detached house in Oakville for CAD $885,000 with a mortgage, premium legal services, standard moving, and premium utilities. To map these to ground-truth ratings: (1) The property type corresponds to the 'purchase_properties' category. Among the listed purchase options, the closest match by price, family suitability, and size is 'Family House' (CAD $650K, rating 10), as it meets 4-bedroom, 2+ bath, family needs, and top school requirements. (2) Financing uses a mortgage with a CAD $1200 processing fee, matching 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). (3) Legal services are 'Complete premium package' at CAD $1200, corresponding to 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). (4) Moving service is 'standard' at CAD $650, matching 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). (5) Setup services use the premium utility package at CAD $280, matching 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
